summary: Comprehensive testing of FletchFlow Claims Adjudication System completed. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages load correctly with proper navigation. Code Database with 4 coverage lines (Medical/Dental/Vision/Hearing) working perfectly with search functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height calculation (-1 values)

passed_tests: ✅ Login with demo@javelina.com / Demo123! (old credentials work)
✅ API: GET /api/fee-schedule/stats returns 189 CPT codes, 87 localities
✅ Dashboard loads with metrics and charts
✅ Code Database page loads with tabs for Medical, Dental, Vision, Hearing
✅ Search dental codes (D1110 in dental tab) - found 1 result
✅ Search vision codes (92014 in vision tab) - found 1 result
✅ Search hearing codes (92557 in hearing tab) - found 1 result
✅ Prior Auth page loads and shows empty state
✅ Network page loads with summary metrics
✅ Settings page shows all 4 coverage lines as active (Medical, Dental, Vision, Hearing)
✅ Fee Schedule page loads with 189 CPT codes, 87 GPCI localities
✅ Duplicates page loads with 1 duplicate alert
✅ Reports page loads with analytics and EDI 835 generation
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts chart width/height warnings in console - consider adding explicit dimensions or ResponsiveContainer wrapper
context_for_next_testing_agent: FletchFlow Claims Adjudication System is fully functional. All 4 coverage lines (Medical 189 CPT codes, Dental 79 CDT codes, Vision 44 codes, Hearing 65 codes = 377 total) are working. Prior Auth, Network, Batch Processing, and COB endpoints are implemented. Dashboard shows real-time metrics. The only minor issue is Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions which don't affect functionality.
